ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., bar chart, line chart) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the chart was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the chart was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the chart */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Whether the chart is published or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., width, height, margin-bottom) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., number, string) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (e.g., pixels, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_properties_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the data belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., CSV file, database) */,
  "data_values" TEXT /* Values of the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the collaborator is working on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, viewer) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the collaborator joined the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_collaborators_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the chart */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_versions_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the analytics belong to */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the chart */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the chart */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the chart */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_analytics_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "theme_description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "theme_code" TEXT /* CSS code for the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "template_code" TEXT /* HTML code for the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code for the color */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the color is a default color or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_fonts" (
  "font_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each font */,
  "font_name" TEXT /* Name of the font */,
  "font_family" TEXT /* Font family of the font */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the font is a default font or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("font_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., boolean, number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_settings_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_comments_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)
